name: @logicn/docs
description: LogicN API documentation generator: emits a valid OpenAPI 3.x document from the App Kernel's governed route table (EffectiveRoutePolicy / RouteDeclaration) and contract metadata. The generated spec documents exactly the gates the kernel enforces — auth, body limits, idempotency, rate limits, and the error contract — and fails closed rather than emit an invalid or misleading governance contract.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
